requirement_topic.en: China GB/T 18487 Baseline vs South Africa Evidence Package
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB/T 18487基线与南非证据包
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB/T 18487基線與南非證據包

summary.en: A South Africa evidence package should be organized around the applicable NRCS scope decision, SANS/IEC 61851 safety file, IEC 62196 connector strategy, NRS or municipal grid-connection evidence, EMC evidence, English installation and user documentation, labels, ratings, and local support information. The package should identify which requirements are legal conditions, which are project or utility conditions, and which are voluntary technical standards.
summary.zh: 南非证据包应围绕适用的NRCS范围判断、SANS/IEC 61851安全文件、IEC 62196接口策略、NRS或市政并网证据、EMC证据、英文安装和用户文件、标签、额定参数以及本地支持信息组织。证据包应区分哪些要求属于法律条件，哪些属于项目或公用事业条件，哪些属于自愿技术标准。
summary.zht: 南非證據包應圍繞適用的NRCS範圍判斷、SANS/IEC 61851安全文件、IEC 62196接口策略、NRS或市政併網證據、EMC證據、英文安裝和用戶文件、標籤、額定參數以及本地支持信息組織。證據包應區分哪些要求屬於法律條件，哪些屬於項目或公用事業條件，哪些屬於自願技術標準。

standards_or_laws: SANS/IEC 61851 and IEC 62196 technical standards where specified
NRS, municipal, utility, EMC, installation, and procurement requirements where applicable

summary.en: The common China baseline is GB/T 18487 for EV conductive charging systems, GB/T 20234 for AC and DC couplers, GB/T 27930 for DC charger-to-BMS communication in many Chinese DC systems, and Chinese CCC or voluntary certification files where applicable. This baseline is a starting point for technical mapping, not a South Africa approval package.
summary.zh: 常见中国基线包括电动汽车传导充电系统GB/T 18487、交流和直流耦合器GB/T 20234、许多中国直流系统采用的直流充电机与BMS通信GB/T 27930，以及适用时的中国CCC或自愿认证文件。该基线是技术映射起点，不是南非批准资料包。
summary.zht: 常見中國基線包括電動汽車傳導充電系統GB/T 18487、交流和直流耦合器GB/T 20234、許多中國直流系統採用的直流充電機與BMS通訊GB/T 27930，以及適用時的中國CCC或自願認證文件。該基線是技術映射起點，不是南非批准資料包。

standards_or_laws: China CCC or voluntary certification files where applicable

gap.en: The South Africa gap matrix should start with a clause-by-clause map from GB/T 18487 to IEC 61851, then add connector redesign, grid and installation approval, NRCS scope review, EMC re-evaluation, English documentation, nameplate ratings, importer details, spare-parts and service instructions, and site commissioning records.
gap.zh: 南非差距矩阵应从GB/T 18487到IEC 61851的逐条映射开始，然后补充接口重设计、电网和安装批准、NRCS适用范围审查、EMC复评、英文文件、铭牌额定值、进口商信息、备件和服务说明以及场站调试记录。
gap.zht: 南非差距矩陣應從GB/T 18487到IEC 61851的逐條映射開始，然後補充接口重設計、電網和安裝批准、NRCS適用範圍審查、EMC複評、英文文件、銘牌額定值、進口商信息、備件和服務說明以及場站調試記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mixed: NRCS LOA, grid approval, installation approval, radio approval, or procurement conditions may be mandatory where applicable; SANS/IEC/NRS standards may be mandatory only when incorporated by those routes or contracts
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 are China baseline standards; China CCC is mandatory only for in-scope products under the current CCC catalogue

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation Standard Public Service Platform

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use China GB/T evidence as the input to a South Africa mapping exercise, not as the final proof of South Africa market access or installation approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将中国GB/T证据作为南非映射工作的输入，而不是作为南非市场准入或安装批准的最终证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將中國GB/T證據作為南非映射工作的輸入，而不是作為南非市場准入或安裝批准的最終證明。
